title: Brain Gateway SRE
description: Full application telemetry for Brain Gateway. Every metric in orchestrator/metrics.py is covered here, grouped by subsystem. Use filters at the top to drill into a specific tool, mode, speaker, or palace wing. Paste a request_id into the text variable to trace a single request end-to-end in the logs row. Generated — edit monitoring/grafana/dashgen/dashboards/brain_gateway_sre.py, not the JSON.

panels.title: Request Latency (p50 / p95 / p99) by Mode
Voice Pipeline Latency (p50 / p95 / p99)
panels.description: Text-in to text-out latency for voice-channel requests. Covers the LLM + tool-loop slice we control; excludes Whisper STT upstream and TTS synthesis + speaker playback downstream. Target: keep p95 under 13s (prior floor). Investigate spikes with the logs row below.

panels.title: Calendar API Latency p95 by operation
Vision Latency p95 + Image Size p95
Training Corpus New Records (daily, by source)
panels.description: Nightly training-corpus drain: in-process counter only — records written by the out-of-process manual backfill are not counted here. A flat-zero series on days you used Jess via OWUI / voice means the drain broke; investigate via the logs row.
